name: sheet
title: Sheet
description: A sliding panel overlay that slides in from any edge of the viewport, with an optional header, scrollable content area, and action footer.

docs.overview: Sheet is a sliding panel overlay that enters from a configurable edge of the viewport (left, right, top, or bottom). It uses Perry's sheetCreate/sheetPresent/sheetDismiss APIs for native overlay behavior. Use SheetHeader for the title and optional description with a close button, SheetContent for scrollable body content, and SheetFooter for action buttons. The sheet has a popover background, border, rounded corners on the exposed side, and the 'dialog' accessibility role.
docs.accessibility: Sheets use the 'dialog' accessibility role. The sheet traps focus while open and returns focus to the triggering element on close. Provide a descriptive title for screen readers and always include a close action.

platformNotes.macos: Renders as a native AppKit side panel or sheet overlay.
platformNotes.ios: Renders as a native UIKit sheet with edge-slide behavior.
platformNotes.linux: Renders as a GTK overlay panel.
platformNotes.windows: Renders using the current Perry Windows backend overlay behavior.
platformNotes.web: Renders as a sliding panel with a semi-transparent backdrop overlay.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the sheet is currently visible

props.name: side
props.description: The edge of the viewport the sheet slides in from

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the sheet in pixels (used as the panel width for left/right, or as the height for top/bottom)

props.name: title
props.description: Sheet title text displayed in the header

props.name: description
props.description: Description text below the title in the header

props.name: children
props.description: Sheet body content (typically wrapped in SheetContent)

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback invoked when the sheet is closed

examples.name: default
examples.title: Basic Sheet (Right Side)

examples.name: left-side
examples.title: Left Side Sheet

examples.name: bottom-sheet
examples.title: Bottom Sheet

examples.name: with-footer
examples.title: Sheet with Footer Actions

agent.summary: Sheet is a sliding panel overlay for forms, navigation, details, and secondary content that benefits from an edge-anchored presentation without fully blocking the main view.
useWhen: Displaying forms or detail panels that slide in from the side
Showing navigation menus on mobile or compact layouts
Presenting share sheets or action sheets from the bottom
Editing settings or profile information in context
Displaying supplementary content alongside the main view
doNotUseWhen: Modal confirmations that require full attention (use Dialog instead)
Simple notifications or toasts (use Alert or Toast instead)
Inline content that does not need overlay behavior
layoutHints: Use side 'right' (default) for detail panels and forms
Use side 'bottom' for action sheets and share menus
Use side 'top' for notification banners or filters
Default width is 400px; use 300px for compact panels and 500+ for complex forms
Wrap body content in SheetContent for scrollable overflow
Place primary actions in SheetFooter with justify-end alignment
accessibilityChecklist: Provide a descriptive title for screen readers
Always include an onClose callback with a visible close action
Ensure focus is trapped within the sheet while open
Announce sheet opening to assistive technology
Return focus to triggering element on close
Use the 'dialog' role for proper screen reader behavior
